title: Add Ideogram 4.0 image models (turbo/balanced/quality)
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds the three Ideogram 4.0 variants as image models, served via Replicate (same path as the seedream models).

- New models: \`ideogram-v4-turbo\` (\$0.03/img), \`ideogram-v4-balanced\` (\$0.06/img), \`ideogram-v4-quality\` (\$0.10/img)
- \`priceMultiplier: 1\` (at-cost, matching the other Replicate image models); \`paidOnly: true\`
- Text-to-image only — verified live the Replicate schema has no \`image\` input and no \`seed\`
- \`resolution\` is a fixed WxH preset enum, so the handler maps the caller's aspectRatio / dimensions to the nearest preset by log-space ratio distance
- Output is a single image-URL string (not an array)

Verified locally against gen :8788 (real Replicate calls):
- All 3 generate 200 + valid JPEG; usage header \`x-usage-completion-image-tokens: 1\`
- Aspect mapping correct: 1:1→2048², 16:9→2560×1440, 9:16→1440×2560
- Tinybird billing rows match (cost 0.03/0.06/0.10, price == cost), cache HIT not billed
- No \`Missing conversion rate\` warnings in worker tail
- Added \`test/image/ideogramModel.test.ts\` (routing + billing + resolution mapping); image suite + model-permissions + pricing snapshot all green

gist.headline: Ideogram 4.0 joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've added Ideogram 4.0 to the API in three flavors: turbo, balanced, and quality. Perfect for when your prompts need that extra typographic polish.
gist.summary: Added Ideogram 4.0 image models (ideogram-v4-turbo, ideogram-v4-balanced, ideogram-v4-quality) via Replicate, available as paid-only options priced at $0.03, $0.06, and $0.10 per image.
gist.impact: Developers can now route text-to-image requests to Ideogram 4.0, with the API automatically mapping requested aspect ratios to the nearest supported resolution preset.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) wearing a tiny painter's beret, inspecting three distinct glowing picture frames (representing turbo, balanced, and quality) alongside the Monitor Robot who is holding a painter's palette.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, inspecting three glowing picture frames that display beautiful landscapes. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a wooden palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a wooden palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background.
